name: se-examples
description: Network-aware Compact examples and integration tests for Midnight

scripts.check: npm run check:v1 && npm run check:v2
scripts.test: npm run test:v1 && npm run test:v2
scripts.e2e:v1: npm run compile:v1 && npm --prefix toolchains/v1 run e2e --
scripts.e2e:v2: npm run compile:v2 && npm --prefix toolchains/v2 run e2e --
